params.prompt: Vertical portrait photograph for a barbershop brand tile, exact 4:5 aspect ratio, 1080x1350. High-contrast black and white editorial photography, duotone grading with a warm golden-yellow rim/key light used only as an implied light source, never a flat color wash, no straight color photography. Scene: an overhead-angled still life on a wooden barber counter of three unlabeled beard-grooming containers side by side -- a small glass dropper oil bottle, a round balm tin, and a round wax tin -- neatly arranged on a folded dark cloth, barber tools (comb, scissors) softly out of focus at the edges, moody barbershop atmosphere, editorial product-trio composition. Absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no graphic overlays, no UI elements anywhere in the image -- pure photography only, a clean background plate.
